title: NarutoCraft
description: NarutoCraft is a mod, based on anime Naruto/Boruto
body:
![NarutoCraft logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfe288e68d519e9b309c2c022bc7e0398bedc2ee.png)
## NarutoCraft - new Naruto mod for Minecraft

(This is my first mod, so I will always be glad for someone else's help)

 
**Features:**
- New Leveling system
- New Models & Textures.
- 10+ Jutsus from Naruto.
- Non-standard mechanics for learning jutsu.
- New weapons from Naruto.
- Creative Items for Multiplayer.


**How to start:**
1. When you appear in the world, you will have Chakra Paper in your inventory. To get initial stats, use this item.
1. To see a menu with your stats press 'G'. In this menu you can upgrade your stats: Ninjutsu, Taijutsu, Shurikenjutsu, etc.
1. To level up, kill mobs and take quests (quests are not implemented)

 

Join my discord server if you have questions, suggestions and/or bugs to report: https://discord.gg/fxZZFwdaFx
The mod is based on the Naruto mod by mathioks, but does not claim to be a complete copy.
NarutoCraft is self-sufficient
